evals.prompt: there's a bug in the autocomplete — when I type a slash command like /gsd:plan and then backspace to delete the colon, the suggestions don't update. it keeps showing the gsd sub-commands instead of going back to the top-level list
evals.expected_output: Should write a failing test first in the autocomplete test file that reproduces the stale-suggestions-after-backspace behavior, then spawn subagents to fix it

evals.prompt: just fix this — the activity log is crashing when the log file doesn't exist yet. getting ENOENT error on first run
evals.expected_output: Despite 'just fix this', should still write a reproduction test for the ENOENT case before attempting fixes. Should not skip the test step even though the user said 'just fix'

evals.prompt: auth-storage.test.ts is passing but in production the API key getter returns undefined when the keychain is empty instead of throwing. can you look into it?
evals.expected_output: Should study existing auth-storage tests, write a new test case for the empty-keychain scenario that expects a throw, confirm it fails, then spawn fix subagents
